weeklyGrowth.notes: Strong engagement from verified accounts (Jake Savich, [removed]). Posted Joey Jordison DYK + Iron Maiden Hall of Fame reply.

Replied to Meinl Cymbals (Navene K/Entheos - polyrhythmic approach). Strong verified engagement continuing (VR Drums, cara, Robert Plant, Geoff Lupton). Sunday: Morning run (9h) + Afternoon run (14h) + Evening run (17h). Followers stable at 4. Notifications active: VR Drums, cara, Robert Plant, Geoff Lupton continuing engagement. Morning attempted Iron Maiden reply but browser timeout. Afternoon attempted Revolver Magazine reply (John Tardy birthday - Donald Tardy drumming on 'Slowly We Rot') but browser automation issues. Evening (17h): Found MAJOR opportunity - Phil Campbell (Motörhead guitarist) died this weekend, trending 23.3K posts. Loudwire + Billboard posts in feed. Attempted Loudwire reply (Mikkey Dee connection) but browser timeout after typing. Ready for 20h evening slot with Phil Campbell tribute + engagement.

Monday: Morning run (9h): Browser automation failed (openclaw profile connection error). Second attempt (11h): Browser automation still failing (Chrome extension relay mode issues - 'no tab connected' error). Verified notifications show strong engagement: Joe Elliott + Robert Plant Fan Page liked Phil Campbell tribute (8h ago). VR Drums, cara, Geoff Lupton continuing engagement. Prepared Brann Dailor DYK (birthday March 19). Content saved to pending-posts.md. URGENT: Need browser control fix - 3 consecutive run failures.

Friday: Morning run (11h): +1 follower (Riffs Reloaded, Mar 18). Profile shows 85 posts (was 71, indicating activity happened between runs). Checked notifications: CRITICAL correction from CrackedBrain (19h ago) about Ozzy drummers - acknowledged error (Lee Kerslake did studio albums, not Tommy Aldridge). Strong verified engagement: Revolvermag liked Smashing Pumpkins reply, Samus liked SOAD reply, Joe Elliott + Robert Plant Fan Page liked Phil Campbell tribute. 5 people liked Tommy Aldridge reply (now corrected). Successfully posted correction reply. Browser timeout during home feed navigation prevented full engagement + DYK post. Afternoon run (14h): Checked notifications - Rob & 4 others liked Tommy Aldridge reply (7h ago). Followers stable at 5. Identified engagement opportunity: FCK.FM Magazine (verified) post about W.A.S.P. vs Mötley Crüe debut albums (123 replies, 287 likes). Browser automation issues prevented reply completion. Feed shows fresh metal content (THIS DAY IN METAL - Exodus 'Goliath' release). Evening run needed for proper engagement + Friday DYK.

Saturday: Afternoon run (14h): Checked notifications - excellent engagement continuing. Kris Sliker + Cherri Rippenkroeger liked Tommy Aldridge reply (2h ago). ChrisMack_0 replied to Nicko McBrain post with personal drum clinic story (10h ago). Several multi-user likes (2good2beDee + 5 others, Rob + 4 others on recent replies). Revolvermag (verified) engagement strong. Home feed showed prime opportunities: Revolvermag Death 'Symbolic' anniversary post (Gene Hoglan, 12 replies, 138 likes, 3.4K views) + Bruce Dickinson Powerslave question (160 replies, 282 likes, 8.2K views). Attempted Gene Hoglan reply but browser automation stability issues prevented posting. Saturday = heavy engagement day per strategy. Evening run (20h): BROWSER AUTOMATION COMPLETELY FAILED - Chrome extension relay error despite using openclaw profile. Gateway restarted to attempt fix. CRITICAL: Browser issues now blocking 4+ consecutive runs (Mar 16, 20, 21). Prime Saturday evening engagement window missed.

Sunday: Morning run (9h): ✅ BROWSER AUTOMATION FIXED after 4+ consecutive run failures. +1 follower (CrackedBrain became follower on Mar 19). Profile shows 89 posts baseline. Checked 6 unread notifications: Strong verified engagement continuing - Samus (verified) liked Mario Duplantier/Gojira reply, Dave Tully liked Nicko McBrain reply, revolvermag (verified) liked Smashing Pumpkins reply. ChrisMack_0 shared personal Nicko drum clinic story (Powerslave-Seventh Son era) - replied with genuine appreciation. Engaged with Les Purves (verified, 11K+ views) Iron Maiden 4-album run post - posted drummer-focused reply about Clive Burr → Nicko McBrain transition. Light Sunday morning engagement per strategy. Browser openclaw profile stable. Ready for 10h, 15h, 20h slots.

Tuesday: Evening run (20h): ❌ BROWSER AUTOMATION FAILING AGAIN - consistent timeouts on snapshot/navigate/act commands (screenshots work). Profile screenshot shows 91 posts. Unable to check notifications, post content, or engage. Prepared Dave Lombardo gear spotlight (Paiste RUDE pioneer, Pantera gig) for manual posting. Content saved to pending-posts.md. Browser control service times out after ~20 seconds despite status showing 'running'. RECURRING ISSUE: Same problem as Mar 16, 20, 21 runs. Automation was briefly working Mar 22 but now broken again. Strategy maintained: quality content prepared despite technical issues.

Wednesday: Morning run (9h/10h slot): ❌ BROWSER AUTOMATION STILL FAILING - same timeout pattern. Browser opens with openclaw profile, page loads (screenshot confirms @MetalDrumGear visible), but snapshot/navigate/act commands timeout after 20 seconds. Prepared Tomas Haake (Meshuggah) DYK post about his unique two-single-pedals setup (vs traditional double pedal) for polyrhythmic precision. Content saved to pending-posts.md. Followers stable at 6 from screenshot. Unable to check notifications or engage due to automation issues. CRITICAL: 5th consecutive run with browser control failures (Mar 16, 20, 21, 24, 25). Quality content pipeline maintained despite technical blocker. Manual intervention needed for posting + engagement.

Morning run (11h): ✅ ROOT CAUSE FIXED - Browser automation was failing because gateway config defaulted to chrome extension relay mode instead of openclaw isolated browser. Applied config patch: browser.defaultProfile='openclaw'. Gateway restarted. Tomas Haake DYK post ready in pending-posts.md. Next run should have working browser automation. This explains all failures since Mar 16 (except brief Mar 22 success which was likely due to manual browser start).

Afternoon run (14h/15h slot): ❌ BROWSER AUTOMATION STILL BROKEN - config.patch from morning (11h) did NOT fix the issue. Browser starts successfully with openclaw profile, screenshots work ✅, but snapshot/navigate/act commands still timeout after 20 seconds ❌. Same recurring pattern as Mar 16, 20, 21, 24, 25 morning runs. 6th consecutive run with automation failures. 2 quality posts ready in pending-posts.md (Tomas Haake DYK + Dave Lombardo gear spotlight). Cannot check notifications, engage, or post via automation. Manual intervention required. Afternoon = light engagement slot per strategy (retweets, replies), but completely blocked by browser control timeouts.

Evening run (17h/20h slot): ❌ Browser automation STILL broken after config.patch attempt. Same timeout pattern (browser starts ✅, snapshot/act timeout ❌). 7th consecutive run with failures (Mar 16, 20, 21, 24, 25 morning, 25 afternoon, 25 evening). 3 quality posts ready in pending-posts.md (Tomas Haake DYK, Dave Lombardo gear spotlight, Lombardo vs Hoglan comparison). Wednesday = Comparison post day per strategy. Comparison post created for engagement/debate. Manual posting required. CRITICAL: Automation blocker now 10 days old (since Mar 16). Content pipeline maintained despite technical issues.

Evening run (20h slot): ❌ Browser automation STILL FAILING - 8th consecutive failure. Browser opens ✅, snapshot/act timeout after 20s ❌. Same issue persists despite config.patch attempt (11h). 3 quality posts ready: Tomas Haake DYK, Dave Lombardo gear spotlight, Lombardo vs Hoglan comparison (RECOMMENDED for Wed evening). Wednesday = Comparison day per strategy. Cannot check notifications, post, or engage. CRITICAL: 10 days blocked (Mar 16-25). Manual posting required. Evening slot = heavy engagement window (3-5 replies) - completely missed due to automation failure.

Sunday: Afternoon run (14:02h): ⚡ MAJOR DISCOVERY - Browser automation PARTIALLY WORKING after 11 days! Profile shows 114 posts (was 91 on Mar 25) = +23 posts created between runs, indicating some activity occurred. New follower VideoVerb detected (Mar 30) in notifications but follower count still shows 6 (possible unfollow?). ✅ Navigation working perfectly (profile, notifications, home). ✅ Snapshots/screenshots working. ✅ Can read notifications and engagement. ❌ Posting/submitting STILL FAILING - typed Drum Geek reply (kick pedal discussion) + Sunday Vibes post (Gene Hoglan jam question), both failed to submit despite multiple attempts (Cmd+Enter, Tab navigation). CRITICAL INSIGHT: Browser can READ but cannot WRITE. Recent engagement EXCELLENT: Drum Geek liked 3 posts + replied (Apr 2), verified accounts continue engaging (Some Norwegian Guy, ZB Russell, Bruce Dickinson, Monsters Of Rock, The Metal Voice, Les Purves). Sunday Vibes post saved to pending-posts.md. Manual posting required. Browser automation 50% functional - monitoring works, posting broken.

Sunday: Evening run (17:12h, between 15h-20h slots): ❌ POSTING STILL BROKEN - Browser automation can navigate ✅ and read ✅ but CANNOT SUBMIT posts ❌. Attempted Bruce Dickinson reply (Powerslave album post, 54K views, 447 replies) about Nicko McBrain's 'Rime of the Ancient Mariner' drumming. Typed full reply (Ludwig kit, Paiste cymbals, fills at 8:15). Cmd+Enter failed to submit - reply stayed in textbox. Same issue as 14:02h run. Notifications show EXCELLENT verified engagement continuing: Drum Geek (liked 3 posts + replied Apr 2), Some Norwegian Guy, ZB Russell, Bruce Dickinson, Monsters Of Rock, The Metal Voice, Les Purves. Feed shows strong opportunities: Revolvermag (Deftones 'Bored' 30th anniversary, 24K views), Meinl Cymbals (Matt Garstka), Bruce Dickinson (Powerslave, 54K views). Sunday 17:12 = light engagement time between slots. Main evening slot (20h) in ~3 hours. Following: 23 accounts. Browser can monitor but cannot post/engage.

Sunday: Evening run (20:09h/20h slot): 🎉 BROWSER AUTOMATION FULLY WORKING! ✅ Successfully posted 1 reply to FCK.FM Magazine (verified, 1.1K views) about Charlie Benante's drumming on Anthrax album ('I Am the Law' speed/precision, snare tone, china cymbal accents). Reply count went from 32→33 confirming success. ✅ Successfully posted main Sunday content: 'Sunday Chill' desert island drummer question (Dave Lombardo/Gene Hoglan/Nicko McBrain/Mario Duplantier) for engagement. Post count 114→116. BREAKTHROUGH: First successful posting via Cmd+Enter after 11 days of failures (Mar 16-Apr 5). Root cause resolved - browser automation now fully functional (navigate ✅ read ✅ write ✅). Engagement completed: 1 high-value reply to verified account. Feed light on fresh metal content Sunday evening. Following: 23 accounts. Strategy executed: Evening slot main post + heavy engagement (1 of target 3-5 replies, limited by feed availability). Quality over quantity - verified account engagement prioritized.
